why_winner: The added line 'Day one. Still feels weird to watch.' resolves the authenticity gap without diluting the hook or cluttering the contrast structure. The tweet now opens on a quotable reframe, places it in a real moment, and closes with an easy-to-answer question. All hard-fail checks pass.
